title: Public visitor searches ETS sessions and sees results
description: This verifies that a public visitor can search ETS sessions from the home page and view matching results.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the search field with a valid subject or career
Submit the search
Verify matching ETS sessions are displayed

title: Student enrolls in an ETS exam
description: A signed-in student can enroll in an ETS exam and see a successful enrollment confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /alumno-login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Open an ETS exam from the available list
Enroll in the exam
Verify an enrollment confirmation is visible

title: Search and open ETS exam details
description: A public visitor can search ETS sessions and open an exam to view its details.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the search field with a subject or career name
Verify the exam list is filtered
Open an exam from the results
Verify the exam details are displayed

title: Student logs in successfully
description: A student can sign in and enter the student area with valid credentials.

steps.description: Navigate to /alumno-login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Verify the student area is displayed

title: Administrator signs in and reaches the admin area
description: This verifies that an administrator can log in with valid credentials and access the authenticated admin shell.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin-login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Verify the admin area is displayed

title: Filter ETS exams by career or turno
description: A public visitor can narrow the ETS list using the available filters and see the results update.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the filter panel
Select a career or turno filter
Verify the exam list is narrowed

title: Student views available ETS exams after login
description: A signed-in student can open the ETS list and see available exams for enrollment.

steps.description: Navigate to /alumno-login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Open the available ETS exams view
Verify available ETS exams are displayed

title: Sign in as jefe de academia
description: A department head can log in with valid credentials and enter the jefe area.

steps.description: Navigate to /jefe-login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Verify the jefe area is displayed
Verify the assigned ETS area is accessible

title: Public visitor opens an ETS exam detail from search results
description: This verifies that a public visitor can open an exam from search results and view its detail information.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the search field with a valid subject or career
Submit the search
Open one of the displayed ETS sessions
Verify the exam detail view is displayed

title: Create a new exam
description: An administrator can add a new ETS exam and see it appear in the exams list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin-login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the exams section
Open the exam creation form
Fill in the exam details with valid values
Submit the form
Verify the new exam is displayed in the list

title: Student registers a new account
description: A new student can complete registration with valid academic details and see a success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /alumno-login
Open the registration form
Fill in the name field with Test Student
Fill in the student ID field with 2023123456
Fill in the email field with student.test@example.com
Fill in the career field with a valid career
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Submit the form
Verify a registration success confirmation is visible

title: Public visitor filters ETS results and sees the list update
description: This verifies that applying a filter on the public search page narrows the displayed ETS sessions.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the search field with a valid subject or career
Select a filter option
Submit the search
Verify the filtered ETS sessions are displayed

title: Student opens an ETS exam details page
description: A signed-in student can inspect the details of a selected ETS exam before enrolling.

steps.description: Navigate to /alumno-login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Open an ETS exam from the available list
Verify the ETS exam details are displayed

title: View the exam list
description: An administrator can open the exams section and see the current ETS exam list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin-login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the exams section
Verify the exam list is displayed

title: Save grades for enrolled students
description: A signed-in department head can enter grades for enrolled students and save them successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /jefe-login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Open an assigned ETS session
Enter grades for the enrolled students
Save the grades
Verify a save confirmation is visible
Verify the submitted grades are displayed

title: Save an ETS exam to favorites
description: A public visitor can bookmark an ETS exam from the search results and keep it saved locally.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the search field with a subject or career name
Save an exam from the results to favorites
Open the saved items section
Verify the saved exam is displayed in favorites

title: Edit an existing exam
description: An administrator can update an existing ETS exam and see the changes reflected in the exams list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin-login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the exams section
Select an existing exam
Edit the exam details with valid values
Submit the form
Verify the updated exam is displayed in the list

title: Student reviews enrollment history and grades
description: A signed-in student can open their enrollment history and see past ETS inscriptions with grades when available.

steps.description: Navigate to /alumno-login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Open Mis inscripciones
Verify the enrollment history and grades are displayed

title: View assigned ETS sessions
description: A signed-in department head can see the list of ETS sessions assigned to their academia.

steps.description: Navigate to /jefe-login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Verify assigned ETS sessions are displayed

title: View saved ETS favorites list
description: A public visitor can open Guardados and review the ETS exams that were saved locally.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the saved items section
Verify the saved exams list is displayed

title: Administrator views dashboard statistics after signing in
description: This verifies that an authenticated administrator can open the dashboard and see aggregate ETS statistics.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin-login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Open the dashboard section
Verify dashboard statistics are displayed

title: Delete an exam
description: An administrator can delete an ETS exam and the list updates to remove it.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin-login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the exams section
Select an existing exam
Delete the exam
Verify the exam is no longer displayed in the list

title: Open an assigned ETS and review enrolled students
description: A signed-in department head can open an assigned ETS session and see the enrolled students list.

steps.description: Navigate to /jefe-login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Open an assigned ETS session
Verify the enrolled students list is displayed

title: Export ETS search results as PDF
description: A public visitor can export the current ETS search results as a PDF file from the search page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Review the current exam list
Export the results as a PDF
Verify the PDF export action completes successfully

title: Public visitor saves and removes an ETS favorite
description: This verifies that a public visitor can add an ETS session to favorites and later remove it from the saved list.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the search field with a valid subject or career
Submit the search
Save one of the displayed ETS sessions as a favorite
Open the saved items section
Remove the saved ETS session from favorites
Verify the saved list is updated

title: Create a new jefe account
description: An administrator can add a new jefe account and see it appear in the jefe list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin-login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the jefes section
Open the jefe creation form
Fill in the name, email, password, and academia fields with valid values
Submit the form
Verify the new jefe account is displayed in the list

title: Export ETS search results as calendar file
description: A public visitor can export the current ETS search results as a calendar file from the search page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Review the current exam list
Export the results as a calendar file
Verify the calendar export action completes successfully

title: Remove an exam from favorites
description: A public visitor can remove a saved ETS exam and see it disappear from the favorites list.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the saved items section
Remove a saved exam from favorites
Verify the removed exam no longer appears in favorites

title: Public visitor exports filtered ETS results
description: This verifies that a public visitor can export the current filtered search results from the public search page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the search field with a valid subject or career
Select a filter option
Submit the search
Export the current results
Verify an export confirmation is visible

title: View the jefe accounts list
description: An administrator can open the jefes section and see the current jefe accounts list.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin-login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the jefes section
Verify the jefe accounts list is displayed

title: Browse reference catalogs
description: An administrator can open the catalogs section and browse the buildings, rooms, and careers lists.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin-login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form

Verify the reference catalogs are displayed

title: Open the campus map
description: A public visitor can open the Mapa section and view the ESCOM campus map.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the campus map section
Verify the campus map is displayed

title: Student sees invalid login feedback
description: A student entering invalid credentials receives an authentication error and stays on the login screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /alumno-login
Fill in the email field with invalid@example.com
Fill in the password field with wrong-password
Submit the form
Verify an invalid-credentials message is visible

title: Administrator opens password recovery
description: This verifies that the administrator can access the password recovery page from the login screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin-login
Open the password recovery link
Verify the password recovery page is displayed

title: Public visitor views the campus map and highlights a building
description: This verifies that a public visitor can open the campus map and select a building to see it highlighted.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the campus map section
Select a building on the map
Verify the selected building is highlighted

title: Student sees registration validation feedback
description: A student submitting incomplete or invalid registration data receives a validation or creation error and remains on the registration form.

steps.description: Navigate to /alumno-login
Open the registration form
Fill in the name field with Test Student
Submit the form
Verify a registration validation error is visible

title: Highlight a building on the campus map
description: A public visitor can select a building on the campus map and see it highlighted.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the campus map section

description: This verifies that an administrator can submit an email address on the password recovery page and see a success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /forgot-password
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Submit the form
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Student cannot enroll twice in the same ETS exam
description: A signed-in student attempting to enroll again in the same exam sees a message indicating the exam is already enrolled.

steps.description: Navigate to /alumno-login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Open an ETS exam from the available list
Enroll in the exam
Enroll in the same exam again
Verify an already-enrolled message is visible

title: Handle an empty ETS search result
description: A public visitor sees an empty state when a search or filter combination returns no ETS sessions.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the search field with a rare subject or career name
Verify an empty state message is displayed

title: Administrator sees an invalid login message

steps.description: Navigate to /admin-login
Fill in the email field with invalid@example.com
Fill in the password field with invalid-password
Submit the form
Verify an invalid credentials message is visible

title: Reject invalid jefe credentials
description: A department head sees an invalid-credentials message when signing in with incorrect credentials.

steps.description: Navigate to /jefe-login
Fill in the email field with invalid@example.com
Fill in the password field with invalid-password
Submit the form

title: Public visitor sees an empty state for no search matches
description: This verifies that the public search page shows an empty state when no ETS sessions match the search criteria.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the search field with a value that produces no matches
Submit the search

title: Administrator opens the privacy policy from login
description: This verifies that the administrator can access the privacy policy from the login screen.

description: This verifies that the password recovery form prevents submission without a valid email address and shows a validation message.
